title: MAIYADUO 60PCS Disposable Toilet Seat Covers, Flushable Toilet Seat Covers for Kids Adults Pregnant Women, Disposable Toilet Seat Cover for Travel, Use in Public Toilets
features: Disposable Toilet Seat Covers: NO MORE STRESS when you need to use a public toilet. Our 60 PCS Toilet Seat Covers will come in handy when needing to use a public toilet. Disposable toilet seat covers are essential for safety and peace of mind.

Protective Anti-Germ Barrier: An easy way to protect sensitive skin from germs, bacteria or impurities, hygiene toilet seat covers are designed for potty trained children or personal health conscious travelers.

Comfort and Sanitary: soft natural wood pulp fabric for maximum comfort, an easy way to keep the skin clean. The flushable toilet seat cover is the best solution to avoid direct contact with toilet seats and maintain health.

Perfect for Travel: Compact, portable and travel-friendly design, the toilet seat covers are perfect for travel. Suitable for home use, shopping mall, station, office or hotel, wherever you go, get a pack of toilet seat covers, life can be much easier.
Easy to Use: No need to touch the toilet seat cover after finishing, the flushable toilet seat covers can be flushed directly into the toilet.
description: Product Description Why You Need Disposable Toilet Seat Covers? Avoid direct contact with dirty toilet seats! As we know,there are a lot of bacteria or germs on the toilet surface,especially in public toilets.Disposable Toilet Seat Covers help you avoid direct contact with dirty toilet seats, while using common and public toilets. Disposable/Hygienic/Flushable Soft natural wood pulp fabric for comfort, an easy way to keep your skin clean. Toilet seat cover is the best solution to avoid direct contact to toilet seats and keep your healthy. Common Size and Anti-slip Suitable for all kinds of common toilets, eliminating the embarrassment that the toilet pad does not match the size of the toilet. EASY TO CARRY 6 Packs of 10 individually packaged toilet seat covers in total （60 pcs）. Lightweight and easy to open, it is very convenient to carry seat covers in your bag while you are shopping or travelling Ideal for Multi-scene Compact and portable, travel friendly design, Toilet seat covers are perfect for on-the-go. Suitable for home use, shopping mall, station, office or hotel, wherever you go, take a pack of toilet seat covers, life can be much easier. Specification size: 35 x 42 cm quantity: 60pcs/6pack
